name: The Antwerp Exchange Bank Company
description_short: Community bank headquartered in Antwerp, Ohio with three locations offering personal and business banking, lending, and digital services.
description_long: Antwerp Exchange Bank is a community-focused financial institution based in Antwerp, Ohio, with a presence spanning three locations: Antwerp (main office), Payne, Ohio, and Harlan, Indiana. The bank positions itself as a neighborhood-oriented alternative to larger institutions, emphasizing personalized service and local relationships. Founded and operated with deep roots in northwest Ohio and northeast Indiana, the bank has maintained a traditional community banking model while incorporating modern digital capabilities. The bank offers a comprehensive suite of retail banking services including multiple checking account tiers (Regular, Advantage, NOW, Super NOW, and Business Checking), diverse savings products, and a Health Savings Account option. On the lending side, AEB provides personal loans, vehicle loans, agricultural and commercial loans, and real estate financing including home purchases, new construction, refinancing, and HELOCs. Digital services include mobile banking via a dedicated app, online bill pay, debit MasterCard with ATM access, CardValet card management, e-statements, and TouchTone Teller services. All three branches offer 24/7 drive-up ATM access and surcharge-free transactions through the MoneyPass ATM network. What distinguishes Antwerp Exchange Bank is its deliberate focus on local community presence and personalized banking relationships rather than scale or cutting-edge fintech features. The bank maintains consistent lobby hours across locations and provides branch-specific lending team contact options. The organization undergoes annual financial audits by Leonard J. Andorfer & Co., LLP and maintains investor relations communications. Their marketing emphasizes neighborhood connection with the tagline "We're Not Just Bankers, We're Neighbors." As a regional community bank, Antwerp Exchange Bank is best suited for customers in northwest Ohio and northeast Indiana seeking traditional banking with local decision-making and relationship-based service. However, customers should note that the bank operates with limited geographic footprint (three branches only), standard industry hours with Wednesday closures at noon, and no indication of specialized products like investment accounts, wealth management, or advanced digital-only services. Customers outside the immediate service area would have limited branch access.
pros: Three convenient branch locations with 24/7 drive-up ATM access at each location
Surcharge-free ATM access nationwide through MoneyPass network partnership
Multiple checking account options tailored to different customer needs (Regular, Advantage, NOW, Super NOW, Business)
Comprehensive lending products including personal, vehicle, agricultural, commercial, and real estate loans
Mobile banking app with Touch ID security and real-time bill pay integration
CardValet card management allowing customers to control transaction limits and geographic restrictions
Dedicated fraud reporting hotline (1-833-735-1894) with after-hours support and lost card service
cons: Limited geographic footprint with only three branch locations in Ohio and Indiana; not accessible to customers outside service area
Wednesday hours limited to 8:30 AM-12:00 PM, restricting access for working professionals on mid-week
No evidence of investment accounts, wealth management, or premium financial planning services beyond basic lending and deposits
No mention of business credit cards, lines of credit, or specialized commercial banking products beyond basic ag/commercial loans
Standard community bank capabilities without digital-first innovation typical of newer financial institutions
best_for: Small business owners and farmers in northwest Ohio and northeast Indiana needing local agricultural and commercial lending
Residents of Antwerp, Payne, Ohio and Harlan, Indiana seeking relationship-based community banking with personalized service
Customers prioritizing branch access and local decision-making over digital-only banking convenience
Individuals needing vehicle financing and personal loans in the bank's service area
diagnosis: Antwerp Exchange Bank is best for customers in northwest Ohio and northeast Indiana who value community relationships and local banking service over digital innovation or geographic convenience. The main caveat is extremely limited branch access—with only three locations across two states, the bank is unsuitable for anyone outside this specific region or who requires branch mobility.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
